name: Rice Peas Tofu
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 1 cup of rice in a microwave-safe container.
2. Add the frozen peas, cubed tofu (if using), non-fat yogurt, salt, black pepper, and paprika to the cooked rice.
3. Allow the mixture to sit on your desk until lunchtime.
4. Once ready, transfer the dish to a microwave-safe container.
5. Microwave for 5 minutes on high or until the peas are tender.
